insight.title: How did you find the location button?
insight.subtitle: Location icon is universal
insight.locationDesc: The pin icon is a world standard symbol for current location.
insight.compassDesc: Compass icon resets orientation to north.
insight.zoomDesc: Two-finger pinch gesture is standard worldwide.

insight.title: How did you find the school?
insight.subtitle: Icons show place types
insight.iconDesc: Icons distinguish place types without language.
insight.tapDesc: Tapping shows place info in bottom panel.
insight.infoDesc: Tap saved places to view details instantly.

quiz3.failureReason: Select park and train for navigation

insight.title: How did you navigate?
insight.subtitle: 3 steps to navigate
insight.destinationDesc: Tap map icon to see place details.
insight.transportDesc: Car, walk, train, bike icons standard.
insight.startDesc: Select destination and transport, then start.

insight.title: How did you find favorites?
insight.subtitle: Star mark means favorites
insight.starTitle: Star is the international favorites symbol
insight.starDesc: Star unified for favorites across maps and SNS.
insight.savedDesc: Saved places found in the list.
